name: Ryan M.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Excellent customer service! Quick to respond, helpful, patient and thorough. My experience has been 5 stars from the first day I called. The onboarding call was by far the most informative and productive set up l have ever experienced. I would highly recommend Synup. The software is so easy to use I could teach my 13 year old to do it.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Nothing so far they are great! I don't anticipate anything that will change that.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Platform to nab angel all clients and allow clients to manage reviews.
